===> The following configuration options are available for rust-1.10.0:
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     GDB=off: Install ports gdb (necessary for debugging rust programs)
     LLNEXTGEN=off: Build with grammar verification
     PORT_LLVM=off: Build against devel/llvm38 instead of bundled version
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
